name: Chicken Noodle Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 5-quart casserole, combine chicken, 4 cups hot water, celery, carrots, basil, rosemary, pepper, and salt.
2. Microwave at High for 30-40 minutes, or until the chicken falls easily from the bone, stirring twice during cooking.
3. Remove chicken from the bones and discard the bones and skin. Dice the meat and return it to the casserole.
4. Add 2 cups hot water and noodles. Cover and microwave at High for 8-10 minutes, or until the water boils.
5. Continue microwaving at High for 7-10 minutes, or until the noodles are tender.
